zh.Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England: 英國波藍德波 白 桑德斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ebrea de Trevers於大約1085年出生時，她的父親Robert de Trevers Lord of Burgh-by-Sands22歲，母親Maud Briquessart18歲。她於1100年之前與Ranulf d'Engaine結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1158年之前。

zh-hans.Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England: 英国波藍德波 白 桑德斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ebrea de Trevers于大约1085年出生时，她的父亲Robert de Trevers Lord of Burgh-by-Sands22岁，母亲Maud Briquessart18岁。她于1100年之前与Ranulf d'Engaine结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1158年之前。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Trevers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Travis
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire and Yorkshire): from Old French and Middle English travers, also Middle English travas, travis, a word with several meanings. It may denote a toll paid for the right to cross a boundary or bridge, the surname perhaps being for someone who paid or collected such tolls. Alternatively, it may mean ‘crosswise, sideways’ or ‘dispute, disagreement’. The Old French word also had the sense ‘crossing, passage’, and it is more than likely that the surname is Norman in origin, for someone who lived at a crossing place or at a place so named (compare French Travers 3). The presence of the preposition ‘de’ (and perhaps also ‘le’) in early forms of the surname appears to indicate a topographic or habitational explanation, but the French preposition and definite article were sometimes added gratuitously to Norman surnames as a sign of their high social status. See also Travers 1.

variants.name: Trevors
meanings: English: variant of Trevor (1) with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Ebrea
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Leandro, Luis, Manuel, Cesar, Jose, Julio, Altagracia, Francisco, Juana, Alba, Amador.

variants.name: Blea
meanings: Short form of   Beatrice   or   Beatrix .

en.lifeSummary: When Ebrea de Trevers was born about 1085, her father, Robert de Trevers Lord of Burgh-by-Sands, was 22 and her mother, Maud Briquessart, was 18. She married Ranulf d'Engaine before 1100. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died before 1158.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ebrea de Trevers est née environ 1085, son père, Robert de Trevers Lord of Burgh-by-Sands, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Maud Briquessart, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Ranulf d'Engaine avant 1100. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 1158.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ebrea de Trevers um 1085 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Trevers Lord of Burgh-by-Sands 22 und ihre Mutter Maud Briquessart 18. Sie hat vor 1100 Ranulf d'Engaine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 1158.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ebrea de Trevers è nata il circa 1085, sua padre, Robert de Trevers Lord of Burgh-by-Sands, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Maud Briquessart, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Ranulf d'Engaine prima del 1100. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 1158.

ja.lifeSummary: Ebrea de Treversが約1085年に生まれた時，父Robert de Trevers Lord of Burgh-by-Sandsは22歳，母Maud Briquessartは18歳であった。1100年以前にRanulf d'Engaineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1158年以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ebrea de Trevers(이)가 대략 1085년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Trevers Lord of Burgh-by-Sands(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Briquessart(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1100년 이전 Ranulf d'Engaine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1158년 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ebrea de Trevers nasceu aproximadamente 1085, seu pai, Robert de Trevers Lord of Burgh-by-Sands, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Maud Briquessart, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Ranulf d'Engaine antes 1100. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 1158.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ebrea de Trevers родилась около 1085 г., её отцу по имени Robert de Trevers Lord of Burgh-by-Sands было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Maud Briquessart, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ranulf d'Engaine перед 1100 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 1158 г.

sm.Abt 1085–Bef 1158: e tusa o le 1085–a'e le'I oo le 1158

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ebrea de Trevers nació aproximadamente 1085, su papá, Robert de Trevers Lord of Burgh-by-Sands, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Maud Briquessart, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Ranulf d'Engaine antes de 1100. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 1158.
